OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE

MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem: Nils Rosenquest; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not Reported. (Dept. 218).

Appearances:
Flo Spears, property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff 1150 Webster Street, Inc.
Attorney, Ryan Mayberry representing the plaintiff.

Defendant, Kelly Hardeman is present.
Attorney, Jessica Tankersley representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. See scanned document for the settlement terms contained in the signed agreement.

This case settled, the trial date of AUG-24-2009 is vacated.
